notes: Epic B.3 gate for npm run data:spell-baseline. expectedMountIndexEntries must match the live API index (± toleranceMountIndex). If expectedUniqueSpellCount is a number, uniqueSummonSpellCount is checked too (journal mounts sharing one summon spell make unique < index). Patch day: npm run data:spell-baseline -- --update-ref then commit this file + optional data/build/mount-spells-raw.json.
